TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Cilamitay ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu ((|Fuli|Zosi go)), kwara sali buwan nya ga 235 buwan, 596 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 71% kyan ku 424 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 29% kyan ku 172 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 69%, Bunun 1%, Paywan 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Cilamitay hya' ga rgyax. tay 'zil na Cilamitay hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Cilamitay hya' ga Chishang. tay mkraya' na Cilamitay hya' ga llyung. qalang Cilamitay ga maki 1 pqwasan biru. tay mkraya' na Cilamitay hya' ga Cihalaay. tay 'zil na Cilamitay hya' ga Lupo. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Cilamitay ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ ʦ~ʨilamitaj ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu ((|*uli|zos~ɕi ɣo)), kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, βunun *%, pajwan *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na ʦ~ʨilamitaj ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj ʔzil na ʦ~ʨilamitaj ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na ʦ~ʨilamitaj ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨħis~ɕħaŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na ʦ~ʨilamitaj ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. qalaŋ ʦ~ʨilamitaj ɣa maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru. taj mkrajaʔ na ʦ~ʨilamitaj ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨiħalaaj. taj ʔzil na ʦ~ʨilamitaj ħjaʔ ɣa lupo. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ ʦ~ʨilamitaj ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Cilamitay ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu ((|Fuli|Zosi go)), kwara sali buwan nya ga 235 buwan, 596 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 71% kyan ku 424 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 29% kyan ku 172 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 69%, Bunun 1%, Paywan 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Cilamitay hya' ga rgyax. tay 'zil na Cilamitay hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Cilamitay hya' ga Chishang. tay mkraya' na Cilamitay hya' ga llyung. qalang Cilamitay ga maki 1 pqwasan biru. tay mkraya' na Cilamitay hya' ga Cihalaay. tay 'zil na Cilamitay hya' ga Lupo. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Cilamitay ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ ʦ~ʨilamitaj ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu ((|*uli|zos~ɕi ɣo)), kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, βunun *%, pajwan *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na ʦ~ʨilamitaj ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj ʔzil na ʦ~ʨilamitaj ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na ʦ~ʨilamitaj ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨħis~ɕħaŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na ʦ~ʨilamitaj ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. qalaŋ ʦ~ʨilamitaj ɣa maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru. taj mkrajaʔ na ʦ~ʨilamitaj ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨiħalaaj. taj ʔzil na ʦ~ʨilamitaj ħjaʔ ɣa lupo. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ ʦ~ʨilamitaj ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
